file_structure.description: Anchor project config pinning Anchor 0.30.1 and Solana CLI 1.18+
Workspace Cargo.toml with release profile (overflow-checks, lto)
Program crate with anchor-lang 0.30.1, anchor-spl 0.30.1, solana-program 1.18
Minimal Anchor program entry with declare_id! and empty #[program] module
Root workspace package.json with tests and cli workspaces
Root TypeScript config
CLI package with commander, @coral-xyz/anchor, @solana/web3.js, bs58
CLI TypeScript config
CLI entry point stub
Tests TypeScript config
Devnet bootstrap script (airdrop, mint, token accounts)
Devnet configuration (populated by setup script)
Pin Bun 1.1+ runtime version
Biome linter/formatter config for TypeScript
Git ignore for target/, node_modules/, keypair files
Project README
GitHub workflows directory stub
K8s Job to create SeaweedFS cto-pay-receipts bucket
ExternalSecret CR for operator keypair via OpenBao
ExternalSecret CR for Helius API key
ConfigMap with SeaweedFS, RPC, and feature flag endpoints
Shell script for idempotent SeaweedFS bucket creation

scaffolds.interfaces:
# Anchor.toml
[toolchain]
anchor_version = "0.30.1"
solana_version = "1.18.26"

[features]
seeds = false
skip-lint = false

[programs.devnet]
cto_pay = "<PROGRAM_ID>"

[registry]
url = "https://api.apr.dev"

[provider]
cluster = "devnet"
wallet = "~/.config/solana/id.json"

[scripts]
test = "bun test"
scaffolds.function_signatures:
# --- infra/gitops/cto-pay-infra-endpoints-configmap.yaml ---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: cto-pay-infra-endpoints
  namespace: cto
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cto-pay
    app.kubernetes.io/component: config
data:
  SEAWEEDFS_ENDPOINT: "http://seaweedfs-s3.cto.svc.cluster.local:8333"
  SEAWEEDFS_BUCKET: "cto-pay-receipts"
  SOLANA_RPC_URL: "https://devnet.helius-rpc.com"
  SOLANA_OPERATOR_KEYPAIR_PATH: "/secrets/operator-keypair.json"
  CTO_PAY_ENABLED: "false"

---
# --- infra/gitops/cto-pay-operator-keypair-externalsecret.yaml ---
apiVersion: external-secrets.io/v1beta1
kind: ExternalSecret
metadata:
  name: cto-pay-operator-keypair
  namespace: cto
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cto-pay
    app.kubernetes.io/component: secrets
spec:
  refreshInterval: 1h
  secretStoreRef:
    name: openbao-backend
    kind: ClusterSecretStore
  target:
    name: cto-pay-operator-keypair
    creationPolicy: Owner
  data:
    - secretKey: operator-keypair.json
      remoteRef:
        key: cto-pay-operator-keypair
        property: keypair

---
# --- infra/gitops/cto-pay-helius-api-key-externalsecret.yaml ---
apiVersion: external-secrets.io/v1beta1
kind: ExternalSecret
metadata:
  name: cto-pay-helius-api-key
  namespace: cto
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cto-pay
    app.kubernetes.io/component: secrets
spec:
  refreshInterval: 1h
  secretStoreRef:
    name: openbao-backend
    kind: ClusterSecretStore
  target:
    name: cto-pay-helius-api-key
    creationPolicy: Owner
  data:
    - secretKey: HELIUS_API_KEY
      remoteRef:
        key: cto-pay-helius-api-key
        property: api-key

---
# --- infra/gitops/cto-pay-receipts-init.yaml ---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: cto-pay-receipts-init
  namespace: cto
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cto-pay
    app.kubernetes.io/component: init
spec:
  ttlSecondsAfterFinished: 300
  template:
    spec:
      restartPolicy: OnFailure
      containers:
        - name: create-bucket
          image: amazon/aws-cli:2.15.0
          command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - |
              aws s3 mb s3://cto-pay-receipts \
                --endpoint-url http://seaweedfs-s3.cto.svc.cluster.local:8333 \
                || true
          env:
            - name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
              value: "admin"
            - name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
              value: "admin"
scaffolds.test_stubs:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# tests/infra-smoke-test.sh — Verify all infrastructure resources
set -euo pipefail

NAMESPACE="cto"
FAILED=0

echo "=== CTO Pay Infrastructure Smoke Tests ==="

# 1. ConfigMap exists with all 5 keys
echo -n "[1/5] ConfigMap cto-pay-infra-endpoints... "
if kubectl get configmap cto-pay-infra-endpoints -n $NAMESPACE -o jsonpath='{.data}' | \
   jq -e 'has("SEAWEEDFS_ENDPOINT", "SEAWEEDFS_BUCKET", "SOLANA_RPC_URL", "SOLANA_OPERATOR_KEYPAIR_PATH", "CTO_PAY_ENABLED")' > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "PASS"
else
  echo "FAIL"; FAILED=$((FAILED+1))
fi

# 2. Operator keypair secret exists
echo -n "[2/5] Secret cto-pay-operator-keypair... "
if kubectl get secret cto-pay-operator-keypair -n $NAMESPACE -o jsonpath='{.data.operator-keypair\.json}' > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "PASS"
else
  echo "FAIL"; FAILED=$((FAILED+1))
fi

# 3. Helius API key secret exists
echo -n "[3/5] Secret cto-pay-helius-api-key... "
if kubectl get secret cto-pay-helius-api-key -n $NAMESPACE -o jsonpath='{.data.HELIUS_API_KEY}' > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "PASS"
else
  echo "FAIL"; FAILED=$((FAILED+1))
fi

# 4. SeaweedFS bucket accessible
echo -n "[4/5] SeaweedFS bucket cto-pay-receipts... "
SEAWEEDFS_EP=$(kubectl get configmap cto-pay-infra-endpoints -n $NAMESPACE -o jsonpath='{.data.SEAWEEDFS_ENDPOINT}')
if aws s3 ls s3://cto-pay-receipts --endpoint-url "$SEAWEEDFS_EP" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "PASS"
else
  echo "FAIL"; FAILED=$((FAILED+1))
fi

# 5. Anchor build succeeds
echo -n "[5/5] anchor build... "
if anchor build > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "PASS"
else
  echo "FAIL"; FAILED=$((FAILED+1))
fi

echo "=== Results: $((5-FAILED))/5 passed ==="
exit $FAILED
scaffolds.pattern_examples:
# Existing secrets pipeline pattern from CTO codebase:
# 1Password → OpenBao → External Secrets Operator → K8s Secret
# Reference: docs/secrets-management.md
#
# Existing SeaweedFS operator in cluster:
# Reference: infra/gitops/applications/operators/README.md → seaweedfs-operator.yaml
#
# Existing Bun build pattern from intake-util:
# "build": "bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile cto-pay"
#
# ArgoCD GitOps pattern: all K8s resources in infra/gitops/ auto-synced
# Namespace: cto (where cto-controller, cto-pm, cto-web run)
#
# Pod spec pattern for consuming these resources:
# spec:
#   containers:
#     - envFrom:
#         - configMapRef:
#             name: cto-pay-infra-endpoints
#         - secretRef:
#             name: cto-pay-helius-api-key
#       volumeMounts:
#         - name: operator-keypair
#           mountPath: /secrets
#           readOnly: true
#   volumes:
#     - name: operator-keypair
#       secret:
#         secretName: cto-pay-operator-keypair

file_structure.description: Program entry with declare_id!, module imports, and initialize_operator handler
State module re-exporting all account types
OperatorConfig PDA account struct (100 bytes)
CustomerBalance PDA account struct (105 bytes)
TaskReceipt PDA account struct (154 bytes) and TaskStatus enum
Instructions module re-exporting all instruction handlers
InitializeOperator accounts struct and handler with vault PDA creation
CtoPayError enum with 12 error variants
PDA seeds and SLOTS_PER_DAY constant
CreateCustomerAccount accounts struct and handler

scaffolds.interfaces:
use anchor_lang::prelude::*;
use anchor_spl::token::{Token, TokenAccount, Transfer};

use crate::constants::*;
use crate::errors::CtoPayError;
use crate::state::{CustomerBalance, OperatorConfig};

// === CreateCustomerAccount Accounts ===

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct CreateCustomerAccount<'info> {
    #[account(mut)]
    pub customer: Signer<'info>,

    #[account(
        init,
        payer = customer,
        space = 8 + CustomerBalance::INIT_SPACE,
        seeds = [CUSTOMER_BALANCE_SEED, customer.key().as_ref()],
        bump,
    )]
    pub customer_balance: Account<'info, CustomerBalance>,

    #[account(
        seeds = [OPERATOR_CONFIG_SEED],
        bump = operator_config.bump,
    )]
    pub operator_config: Account<'info, OperatorConfig>,

    pub system_program: Program<'info, System>,
}

// === Deposit Accounts ===

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct Deposit<'info> {
    pub customer: Signer<'info>,

    #[account(
        mut,
        seeds = [CUSTOMER_BALANCE_SEED, customer.key().as_ref()],
        bump = customer_balance.bump,
        has_one = customer,
    )]
    pub customer_balance: Account<'info, CustomerBalance>,

    #[account(
        mut,
        constraint = customer_token_account.mint == operator_config.mint @ CtoPayError::InvalidMint,
    )]
    pub customer_token_account: Account<'info, TokenAccount>,

    #[account(mut)]
    pub vault: Account<'info, TokenAccount>,

    #[account(
        seeds = [OPERATOR_CONFIG_SEED],
        bump = operator_config.bump,
    )]
    pub operator_config: Account<'info, OperatorConfig>,

    pub token_program: Program<'info, Token>,
}

// === Withdraw Accounts ===

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct Withdraw<'info> {
    pub customer: Signer<'info>,

    #[account(
        mut,
        seeds = [CUSTOMER_BALANCE_SEED, customer.key().as_ref()],
        bump = customer_balance.bump,
        has_one = customer,
    )]
    pub customer_balance: Account<'info, CustomerBalance>,

    #[account(
        mut,
        constraint = customer_token_account.mint == operator_config.mint @ CtoPayError::InvalidMint,
    )]
    pub customer_token_account: Account<'info, TokenAccount>,

    #[account(mut)]
    pub vault: Account<'info, TokenAccount>,

    #[account(
        seeds = [OPERATOR_CONFIG_SEED],
        bump = operator_config.bump,
    )]
    pub operator_config: Account<'info, OperatorConfig>,

    pub token_program: Program<'info, Token>,
}

// === UpdateSpendingCaps Accounts ===

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct UpdateSpendingCaps<'info> {
    pub customer: Signer<'info>,

    #[account(
        mut,
        seeds = [CUSTOMER_BALANCE_SEED, customer.key().as_ref()],
        bump = customer_balance.bump,
        has_one = customer,
    )]
    pub customer_balance: Account<'info, CustomerBalance>,
}

file_structure.description: SettleTask accounts struct and handler with 5-step validation, fee computation, CPI transfer
RefundTask accounts struct and handler with ledger-only accounting
Pause instruction — set operator_config.paused = true
Unpause instruction — set operator_config.paused = false
Re-export all 8 instruction modules
Register all 9 instructions in program module

scaffolds.interfaces:
use anchor_lang::prelude::*;
use anchor_spl::token::{Token, TokenAccount, Transfer};

use crate::constants::*;
use crate::errors::CtoPayError;
use crate::state::{CustomerBalance, OperatorConfig, TaskReceipt, TaskStatus};

// === SettleTask Accounts ===

#[derive(Accounts)]
#[instruction(task_id_hash: [u8; 32])]
pub struct SettleTask<'info> {
    pub operator: Signer<'info>,

    #[account(
        seeds = [OPERATOR_CONFIG_SEED],
        bump = operator_config.bump,
        has_one = authority @ CtoPayError::UnauthorizedOperator,
    )]
    pub operator_config: Account<'info, OperatorConfig>,

    #[account(mut)]
    pub customer_balance: Account<'info, CustomerBalance>,

    #[account(
        init,
        payer = operator,
        space = 8 + TaskReceipt::INIT_SPACE,
        seeds = [TASK_RECEIPT_SEED, &task_id_hash],
        bump,
    )]
    pub task_receipt: Account<'info, TaskReceipt>,

    #[account(mut)]
    pub vault: Account<'info, TokenAccount>,

    #[account(
        mut,
        constraint = treasury.mint == operator_config.mint @ CtoPayError::InvalidMint,
    )]
    pub treasury: Account<'info, TokenAccount>,

    pub token_program: Program<'info, Token>,
    pub system_program: Program<'info, System>,
}

// === RefundTask Accounts ===

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct RefundTask<'info> {
    pub operator: Signer<'info>,

    #[account(
        seeds = [OPERATOR_CONFIG_SEED],
        bump = operator_config.bump,
        has_one = authority @ CtoPayError::UnauthorizedOperator,
    )]
    pub operator_config: Account<'info, OperatorConfig>,

    #[account(mut)]
    pub customer_balance: Account<'info, CustomerBalance>,

    #[account(
        mut,
        constraint = task_receipt.customer == customer_balance.customer @ CtoPayError::UnauthorizedCustomer,
    )]
    pub task_receipt: Account<'info, TaskReceipt>,
}

// === Pause / Unpause Accounts ===

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct Pause<'info> {
    pub operator: Signer<'info>,

    #[account(
        mut,
        seeds = [OPERATOR_CONFIG_SEED],
        bump = operator_config.bump,
        has_one = authority @ CtoPayError::UnauthorizedOperator,
    )]
    pub operator_config: Account<'info, OperatorConfig>,
}

#[derive(Accounts)]
pub struct Unpause<'info> {
    pub operator: Signer<'info>,

    #[account(
        mut,
        seeds = [OPERATOR_CONFIG_SEED],
        bump = operator_config.bump,
        has_one = authority @ CtoPayError::UnauthorizedOperator,
    )]
    pub operator_config: Account<'info, OperatorConfig>,
}
